EMAIL.recommendation: Use a secondary email address for public profiles and avoid exposing your primary email.

PHONE.recommendation: Avoid publishing your personal phone number publicly. Consider using a secondary contact number.

PERSON.recommendation: Sharing your name is generally acceptable, but avoid combining it with sensitive personal information.

LOCATION.recommendation: Avoid sharing your exact location or home address in public posts.

ADDRESS.recommendation: Never publicly share your complete residential address.

PASSWORD.recommendation: Never share passwords under any circumstances. Change the password immediately if it has been exposed.

OTP.recommendation: Never disclose OTPs to anyone. Legitimate organizations will never ask for them.

AADHAAR.recommendation: Avoid sharing your Aadhaar number publicly. Mask it whenever possible.

PAN.recommendation: Keep your PAN confidential and share it only with trusted organizations when required.

PASSPORT.recommendation: Do not upload or share passport details on public platforms.

BANK_ACCOUNT.recommendation: Never expose your bank account number publicly.

UPI.recommendation: Share your UPI ID only when necessary and verify payment requests carefully.

CREDIT_CARD.recommendation: Never share your credit card number, CVV, or expiry date.

CVV.recommendation: CVV should never be stored or shared.

DATE_OF_BIRTH.recommendation: Avoid displaying your full date of birth publicly since it is commonly used for identity verification.

IP_ADDRESS.recommendation: Avoid exposing your IP address publicly to reduce unnecessary security risks.

URL.recommendation: Verify that shared URLs do not reveal sensitive information.
